Title: Apple Business Manager + Intune ADE Enrollment Profiles
Description: Configure Apple Business Manager (ABM) Automated Device Enrollment for the 8 new AFFG Apple endpoints (2 new Mac Minis + 6 MacBook Neos). Link ABM to Technijian's Intune tenant via MDM server token (re-verify link if already established for the 2 pre-onboarded Macs). Create the macOS enrollment profile: user-driven mode, Setup Assistant customization (skip Apple ID, Siri, Touch ID optional, Technijian branding), Entra ID join via Platform SSO. Register all 8 new device hardware serials in ABM. Verify ADE readiness.

Title: Intune Compliance Policies for macOS
Description: Create or update Intune compliance policies for macOS endpoints: require FileVault encryption, Gatekeeper in Developer-ID-signed-only mode, XProtect active, firewall enabled, minimum macOS version, screen lock timeout (15 min), and passcode complexity. Configure non-compliance action: mark non-compliant after 1 day, block M365 access via Conditional Access integration.

Title: Intune Configuration Profiles for macOS
Description: Deploy Intune configuration profiles for all 10 Apple endpoints: FileVault silent enable with institutional key escrow, Gatekeeper strict, System Integrity Protection verified, macOS firewall rules, Software Update for macOS (monthly quality + quarterly feature), passcode complexity policies, and telemetry settings. Test profile application on one Mac Mini and one MacBook Neo before full-fleet deployment.

Title: Mac ABM Enrollment & Imaging (8 New Apple Endpoints)
Description: Execute ABM-based enrollment for the 8 new AFFG Apple endpoints (2 new Mac Minis + 6 MacBook Neos). Each device: factory reset (erase all content and settings), connect to internet, run Setup Assistant, verify automatic Intune enrollment via ADE, confirm Entra ID join via Platform SSO, validate all compliance profiles applied (FileVault active with key escrowed, Gatekeeper, firewall, OS up to date). Document device serial, Entra device ID, and compliance state. The 2 pre-onboarded Mac Minis are handled under Ticket AFFG-004-027.

Title: Endpoint Security Stack Deployment (10 macOS Endpoints)
Description: Deploy the Technijian macOS endpoint security stack to all 10 Apple endpoints via Intune app deployment: CrowdStrike Falcon for Mac (AVD, EDR), Huntress macOS (AVMH, Managed Detection), ManageEngine Patch Management for macOS (PMMAC, per Price List rev 2026-03-23), ConnectWise ScreenConnect macOS agent (MR, My Remote). Verify agent check-in for each product on all 10 devices. Test CrowdStrike with EICAR, confirm Huntress 24/7 monitoring, validate PMMAC patch queue and asset inventory. Cisco Umbrella (SI) is NOT deployed (removed from the stack in this revision).

Title: Teramind / MyAudit UAM+DLP Agent Deployment on 10 Macs
Description: Install and configure the Teramind / MyAudit UAM+DLP agent (macOS build) on all 10 Apple endpoints. Configure DLP policies: block USB/external storage writes, block local download of regulated data, block print-to-local, block clipboard copy to unmanaged apps, block screen capture. Enable user-activity monitoring per FINRA 3110 supervisory requirements. Verify 1-year retention policy. Validate detection accuracy with test scenarios. Document any macOS-specific coverage differences versus the Windows DLP baseline for the Phase 5 gap assessment.

Title: Conditional Access Policy Suite
Description: Configure Entra ID Conditional Access policy suite for managed-Mac model: Policy 1 — Require Intune-compliant device for M365 access (Exchange, SharePoint, OneDrive, Teams) across macOS and iOS. Policy 2 — Block legacy authentication (IMAP, POP3, SMTP AUTH, Exchange ActiveSync). Policy 3 — Require MFA for all sign-ins. Apply to all 31 M365 users. Test personal-device blocking and legacy-auth rejection.

Title: CloudBrink ZTNA Tenant & Connector Setup
Description: Provision CloudBrink ZTNA tenant for AFFG. Deploy CloudBrink connector (edge appliance) integrated with AFFG network. Configure identity provider integration with Microsoft Entra ID for SSO. Define application resources: M365, Schwab Advisor Services, Interactive Brokers TWS, internal file shares. Reg S-P 248.30(a)(3); NIST AC-17, SC-7.

Title: CloudBrink Agent Deployment to 10 Managed Macs
Description: Deploy CloudBrink ZTNA agent (macOS build) to all 10 Apple endpoints via Intune app deployment (macOS package). Configure per-user ZTNA policies: device posture check (Intune compliance + FileVault + CrowdStrike/Huntress active) required per session. Verify agent auto-start, silent authentication via Entra SSO, and per-application micro-segmented access.

Title: CloudBrink Access Policies & Micro-Segmentation
Description: Configure CloudBrink per-application access policies: Schwab Advisor Services (HTTPS only), Interactive Brokers (TWS + IBKR Web), M365 suite, internal file shares. Enable per-session device posture verification. Configure session logging (user, device, app, duration, source IP). Block lateral movement between applications.

Title: Schwab & IBKR Access Migration (Office IP Whitelist to ZTNA)
Description: Coordinate with Schwab Advisor Services and Interactive Brokers to transition custodian access from AFFG's existing office-IP whitelist to CloudBrink ZTNA-based access. Submit updated access configurations to each custodian, validate ZTNA-routed connections from multiple network locations (office, home, travel) on the new Macs, and confirm the legacy office-IP entries can be removed from each custodian's allowlist after cutover.

Title: Intune BYOD Enrollment for 10 Personal Phones
Description: Enroll all 10 personal cell phones in Microsoft Intune under a BYOD work-profile model. For iOS devices: enroll via Apple Business Manager User Enrollment mode linked to Technijian's Intune tenant — creates an Intune-managed work profile that isolates corporate apps, data, and identity from personal content; provision Managed Apple IDs where required. For Android devices: enroll via Intune 'personally-owned work profile' (Android Enterprise BYOD) — parallel isolation model. Configure enrollment profile: require encryption of the work profile, work-profile PIN/biometric, minimum OS version, jailbreak/root detection. Verify each device shows compliant in Intune portal. Intune licensing included in M365 E3 — no additional license cost.

Title: Intune App Protection (MAM) Policies for Mobile
Description: Create and deploy Intune App Protection Policies for Outlook, OneDrive, Teams, and Edge on personal phones. Block: copy/paste to personal apps, save-as to personal storage, screenshots of corporate content. Require: PIN/biometric for corporate apps. Auto-unenroll: on jailbreak/root detection or 30 days offline. Test containerization on pilot device.

Title: Mobile Selective Wipe & Termination Procedures
Description: Configure selective wipe (corporate data only) capabilities for all 10 personal phones. Because devices are personally-owned, full device wipe is NOT used — only selective wipe of the work profile and managed apps, preserving the user's personal content. Document the termination procedure: HR notifies Technijian, Technijian executes work-profile selective wipe within 1 hour, wipe confirmation logged. Test selective wipe on pilot device. Configure auto-wipe triggers for jailbreak/root and extended offline.

Title: User Data Migration & Legacy Device Offboarding
Description: Migrate user data, application settings, browser bookmarks, and Outlook profiles from each user's existing work device to the new managed Mac (Mac Mini or MacBook Neo). After migration validation: securely offboard the 4 legacy devices in scope — MACBOOK-PRO-4 (MacBook Pro), KIKI (Surface Pro 8), LEON (Lenovo V15 G2 IJL), and MAGGIE (Surface Pro 8). Offboarding: remove from Intune, remove from Entra, full-disk wipe per NIST SP 800-88 Clear/Purge, document chain-of-custody. Verify Outlook mail/calendar, OneDrive sync, Teams sign-in, browser bookmarks, and line-of-business application access on each new Mac.

Title: User Training — macOS Managed Device Workflow
Description: Conduct training sessions for all 10 AFFG users on the macOS managed-device workflow: Mac sign-in with Entra ID + MFA via Platform SSO, CloudBrink ZTNA auto-connect, Schwab/IBKR access via CloudBrink, Teramind DLP restrictions (no USB/download/print), personal-phone BYOD enrollment and app-containerization workflow, work-profile vs. personal-profile boundaries, what to do if device is lost/stolen. Produce a quick-reference guide for the macOS managed-device workflow and a BYOD phone enrollment guide (iOS ABM User Enrollment + Android Work Profile variants).

Title: Pilot Operation Window (2–3 Users on Managed Macs)
Description: Run a 2-week pilot operation window with 2–3 designated AFFG users operating on the new managed Macs while the remaining users continue on their existing devices. Pilot users exercise all workflows (M365, Schwab, IBKR, internal shares) across multiple network locations via CloudBrink ZTNA. Monitor CloudBrink connectivity, Teramind DLP events, Conditional Access blocks, and user friction. Resolve issues before full fleet cutover.

Title: Legacy Office-IP Whitelist Decommission
Description: After all 10 users have cut over to managed Macs and ZTNA-based custodian access is validated: coordinate with Schwab Advisor Services and Interactive Brokers to remove AFFG's office-IP entries from each custodian's allowlist. Verify that custodian access now requires a posture-verified managed Mac via CloudBrink. Document the final-state access architecture for the compliance binder.

Title: Monitoring Expansion — Device Fleet & CloudBrink
Description: Expand the existing monthly compliance assessment to include: Intune device fleet monitoring (all 10 Apple endpoints + 10 personal phones enrolled, encrypted, patched, checking in), CloudBrink agent status (active, posture checks passing, unauthorized access attempts), Conditional Access sign-in analytics. Update the monthly compliance dashboard PDF template to reflect the all-Apple managed-device architecture with BYOD mobile.

Title: Monthly Mobile Device Audit Configuration
Description: Configure the monthly mobile device audit: enrolled work-profile count vs. headcount, compliance violations, selective-wipe history, jailbreak/root detection events. Fold into existing Technijian assessment cadence per FINRA 3110(c) and 3120. Produce audit evidence template for regulator presentation.

Title: End-to-End Security Validation
Description: End-to-end validation of the managed-Mac control stack: attempt M365 access from personal device without work profile (should block), attempt USB data exfiltration on Mac (Teramind should block), attempt legacy auth (should block), attempt CloudBrink bypass (should fail), attempt access with non-compliant Mac (should block). Document results for compliance binder.

Title: Post-Deployment Compliance Gap Assessment
Description: Conduct a gap assessment verifying that every citation in the Control-to-Citation Map (Reg S-P, FINRA 3110, FINRA 4370, SEC 17a-4, NIST 800-53) is met by the deployed macOS managed-device architecture. Compare deployed controls against the SOW Section 3 commitments. Document any macOS-specific residual gaps (particularly Teramind DLP coverage differences vs. Windows baseline) and remediation ownership. Store evidence in the compliance binder.

Title: Compliance Documentation Suite
Description: Produce the compliance documentation suite aligned with the macOS managed-device architecture: Incident Response Plan (IRP) referencing managed Apple endpoints + CloudBrink + Teramind DLP, Business Continuity / Disaster Recovery disclosure, Service Provider Oversight (including CloudBrink and Teramind as assessed vendors), supervisory audit-trail architecture (Mac endpoint + CloudBrink + Teramind + Intune model). Cover Reg S-P 2024, FINRA 3110/4370, SEC 17a-4, NIST SP 800-53 Rev 5.

Title: Schedule A Amendment — Consolidate to 10 macOS Endpoints + Add Managed Stack
Description: Draft Schedule A amendment to MSA-AFFG-2026 per the Technijian Services Price List (rev 2026-03-23): (a) consolidate the fleet from 16 Windows-priced desktops in the signed Schedule A to 10 macOS-priced endpoints (4 Mac Minis + 6 MacBook Neos), swapping Windows PMW ($4.00) for macOS PMMAC ($11.00) and removing the per-device SI line ($6.00) from the stack, and (b) add the Teramind / MyAudit UAM+DLP service (AMDLP1Y at $108.10/Mac) × 10 as the single new Schedule A recurring line. Net monthly change: +$932.00/mo (from signed $2,794.50/mo to $3,726.50/mo). Intune for Macs and personal phones included in M365 E3 at no additional Technijian charge. CloudBrink subscription AFFG-procured (not in Schedule A). SSO-2FA and Credential Manager are NOT included in this revision.

Title: Config Cleanup on 2 Pre-Onboarded Mac Minis
Description: Complete the endpoint configuration on the 2 Mac Minis that AFFG pre-onboarded prior to this SOW. For each of the 2 pre-onboarded Mac Minis: (a) uninstall the Cisco Umbrella (SI) roaming client (no longer part of the endpoint stack); (b) install any missing agents from the final stack — PMMAC (ManageEngine Patch Management for macOS), CrowdStrike Falcon for Mac (AVD), Huntress macOS (AVMH), CloudBrink ZTNA, Teramind / MyAudit UAM+DLP (AMDLP1Y), My Remote / ScreenConnect (MR) — skipping agents already present and healthy; (c) reconfirm Intune compliance state (FileVault on, XProtect active, firewall on, OS version within policy); (d) rebind device identity to the current Entra ID / Intune tenant configuration if required; (e) document the final post-cleanup agent inventory per device for the compliance binder.
